body: Hey Amara, following up on our conversation from last week about the [Halfway Capital](orgs/halfway-capital) portfolio overlap we were exploring. I've had a chance to dig into the [Tartan VC](orgs/tartan-vc) deal flow from Q1 and I think there are actually two or three companies where a co-investment structure could make a lot of sense, particularly on the climate infra side. One name in particular keeps coming up in our diligence conversations that I suspect you've already seen — happy to share notes if you're open to a quick sync. Would Thursday or Friday afternoon work for a 30-minute call to go through the specifics?
